introSection: Fami'Stéric was a steel roller coaster previously located at Fami P.A.R.C in Nonville, Île-de-France, France.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The ride opened with red track and blue supports at Brean Leisure Park. This was repainted to blue track and yellow supports at Pirat' Parc, and for the final time to yellow track and light green supports at Fami P.A.R.C.

fullText:
Fami'Stéric was a steel roller coaster previously located at Fami P.A.R.C in Nonville, Île-de-France, France.



The ride opened with red track and blue supports at Brean Leisure Park. This was repainted to blue track and yellow supports at Pirat' Parc, and for the final time to yellow track and light green supports at Fami P.A.R.C.
